what: PER-STREAM TREES LIVE A/B (PR #86) + K-TUNED CHAIN REFERENCE on one 6x5090 EU ring, 3 reps. VERDICT: trees-as-built HIT THE KILL CRITERION (-29..-63%/stream vs K-tuned chains on every arm) — the g lever WORKS (+15-70% committed/round, receipts valid, zero pairing/echo aborts) but tree frames run EAGER stage-side: round decomposition (M25_STAGE_TIMING, reasoning-B4) = tree frame 154ms summed stage compute vs 45ms graph-replayed chains (3.4x), rounds 328ms vs 169ms. WHAT BINDS = missing CUDA graphs on the tree kernel (plan .claude/plans/tree-graph-capture.md), not g/wire. THE SURPRISE: K=6 chains lift every g-bound B4 arm massively (reasoning 14->29, mix 14.2->17.9 which clears the >=16 bar, prose ->18.5, summarize ->18.2 RECOVERED, qa ->21.1) while K=8 wins at B<=2 (22.5/21.7) — per-content K must be per-(content, B): dead-slot payload binds at B>=4 only. Summarize's 07-11 fp8 g-collapse did NOT reproduce (content-shift noise, closed).
ring: 6 stages BG(head,[0:2]) PL[2:14] SE[14:26] HU[26:38] RS[38:50] BG[50:62], iids 44558734/44558723/44558716/44558714/44558715/44558718, M25_EAGLE=1 M25_BATCH=8 kv 4096, graphs on (M25_GRAPH_MAX=32, zero refusals/capture-fails all stages), fp8 wire + bf16 aux (M25_FP8_AUX=0), aux_local ON, aux slim ON, cwnd keep-warm 150ms, M25_STAGE_TIMING=1, K=8 max_new 96, receipts ON, tree knobs M=12 topb=3 depth=8, M25_DELOCKSTEP default-ON build (#87)
method: SWEEP_TREE_ARMS=off,on x 3 reps (rows dispatch both passes, S.M25_TREE per pass, armed truth recorded per job) + SWEEP_K=6 tree=off chain-reference pass. g = COMMITTED/round (uniform chain+tree since #86 — pre-#86 receipts quote accept-only g, ~1 lower on divergence-heavy content; never compare raw). rep1 tree=off reasoning (2.7/stream) and prose (6.3) were transient stall outliers — reruns and reps 2/3 sit at 14.0/21.4; medians quoted.

bcurve_agg_median.note: B=1/2/4/8 mixed-content agg tok/s; off-curve consistent w/ perstream-delockstep-20260711 (23.0/30.9/54.3/111.5)

decomposition_reasoning_B4.note: per-stage [span,compute] stamps; tree pass = mostly tree frames on novel content; eager 62-layer tree blocks vs RowGraphRunner replays

verdicts.kill_criterion: HIT: tree-on < K-tuned chains everywhere (-29..-63%). Trees stay env-armed only (M25_TREE default off); graph-capture lever is the unlock (planned).
verdicts.full_bar_with_k_tuned_chains_B4: mix 17.9 (>=16 MET), qa 21.1, reasoning 29.0, tools 24.2 (K8: 29.7), code 19.8, summarize 18.2, prose 18.5 (target 20: 1.5 short — K=5 + tree-graphs are the remaining levers)
verdicts.content_routing_action: route K by (class, B): B<=2 -> K=8; B>=4 -> K=6 (tools stays 8: g=5 earns it; reasoning moves OFF the K8 list). Gateway change, offline-testable.
